lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Corvette ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Corvette
sources.what: Ship overview: stats, internals layout, seven hardpoints, price, and Federal rank requirement.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Federal Corvette lore, Core Dynamics manufacturer, combat profile, and design notes.

sources.label: YouTube — The Buur Pit
sources.what: In-depth Federal Corvette review covering its handling, hardpoint loadout, and standing as a top-tier combat ship.
